name: sehat-setu-backend
description: Backend API for Sehat Setu Healthcare Platform

scripts.dev: PowerShell -Command "$p = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess; if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }" & nodemon --ext js server.js
